name: Sequence
definition: An ordered collection of objects indexed by natural numbers or another ordered set.

name: Recurrence relation
definition: A rule defining each term of a sequence from earlier terms.

name: Mathematical induction
definition: A proof principle for establishing statements across natural numbers.

name: Proof dependency graph
definition: A directed graph representing dependency relations among definitions, lemmas, propositions, and theorems.

name: Counterexample
definition: An object or case showing that a universal claim is false.
